Блок1-07 Скандинавский модерн.scriptText:
Северный минимализм на российской земле.

Пустой участок среди сосен — взят на аукционе.

Светлый фасад, двускатная кровля, большие окна.

Терраса, газон, мягкий свет.

Уютно и навсегда. Торги Земли.
Блок1-07 Скандинавский модерн.whiskPrompts:
Empty grassy plot among tall pines with a surveyor marker peg, low drone three-quarter angle at soft golden hour, this is the FUTURE SITE — NO building yet, modern premium Russian residential setting, gentle light forest and hills on the horizon, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The SAME compact single-story modern Scandinavian house from the SAME low drone three-quarter angle: ONE simple rectangular single volume with a light beige fiber-cement facade and warm vertical timber cladding accents, a STEEP GABLE roof clad in dark grey standing-seam metal, the front gable end fully glazed in two levels with slim black frames, a wide wooden terrace deck across the front, NO side extensions, NO dormers, NO attached wings, NO second gable, tall pines around in identical positions — shown at an EARLY CONSTRUCTION stage: only the timber structural frame with OSB sheathing is up, the roof is the same STEEP GABLE silhouette in bare framing (NO flat roof, NO hip roof, the gable shape is IDENTICAL to the finished house), the front gable end left open for the future two-level glazing, concrete slab foundation, bare soil around, NO landscaping yet, building materials stacked neatly, soft golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME compact single-story modern Scandinavian house from the SAME angle — ONE simple rectangular single volume, light beige fiber-cement facade with warm vertical timber cladding accents, the SAME STEEP GABLE roof in dark grey standing-seam metal, the SAME front gable end fully glazed in two levels with slim black frames, the SAME wide wooden terrace deck, NO side extensions, NO dormers, NO second gable — now STRUCTURALLY COMPLETE with finished facade, roof and all glazing installed, bare soil still around, NO landscaping yet, the SAME pines behind, soft golden hour, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME compact single-story modern Scandinavian house from the SAME angle — ONE rectangular single volume, light beige fiber-cement facade with timber accents, STEEP GABLE dark grey metal roof, fully glazed two-level gable end, wide wooden terrace deck, NO side extensions, NO dormers, NO second gable — now with COMPLETE landscaping: fresh green lawn, wooden and stone pathways, low ornamental shrubs, the SAME tall pines around, warm afternoon light, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
The EXACT SAME compact single-story modern Scandinavian house from the SAME angle — ONE rectangular single volume, light beige fiber-cement facade with timber accents, STEEP GABLE dark grey metal roof, fully glazed two-level gable end, wide wooden terrace deck, the SAME COMPLETE landscaping as the previous frame (same lawn, same pathways, same shrubs, same pines, NOTHING about the house or garden changes) — in the evening, warm cozy light glowing in the large windows, a Slavic European family with light skin relaxing on the terrace, dusk, cinematic photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no signage, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
Блок1-07 Скандинавский модерн.videoPrompts:
Slow steady forward drone push-in over the empty plot among pines, branches sway softly, fixed locked-off camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, NO handheld wobble, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Almost still living-photo of the compact Scandinavian house at its frame stage: the house holds EXACTLY its current shape, its SINGLE-STORY height and its STEEP GABLE roof silhouette throughout — this is ONE story only, the house NEVER grows taller, NEVER gains a second floor or extra story, the roof NEVER changes shape (stays the same steep gable, NO flat, NO hip at any moment), only very subtle finishing details settle and the light shifts gently, exactly ONE house, NO second volume, fixed locked-off camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, QUIET ambience, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Almost still living-photo: the light fiber-cement facade, steep gable roof and two-level glazing are complete on the same rigid SINGLE-STORY house, only faint light shift, the house stays identical and single-story — NEVER gains a floor, NEVER changes roof shape, fixed locked-off camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Seamless time-lapse: terrace, lawn, pathways and soft landscaping appear around the same house, the house stays identical and rigid, fixed locked-off camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Evening: warm window lights switch on, the family relaxes on the terrace, the house and garden stay identical to the previous frame, camera slowly and steadily pulls back, fixed smooth motion, NO camera shake, NO handheld wobble, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
